signals.headline: Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as favorite for 2025-26 NBA Rookie of the Year after scoring 96 points over two game
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as favorite for 2025-26 NBA Rookie of the Year after scoring 96 points over two games|YES|HIGH**

Cooper Flagg, Dallas Mavericks rookie, passed Charlotte Hornets' Kon Knueppel in DraftKings ROY odds (-250 vs. +180) following a 51-point game vs. Orlando Magic (Friday) and 45 points, 9 assists, 8 rebounds vs. Los Angeles Lakers (Sunday win, 134-128).[1][2]  
Flagg

signals.raw:
